'''''Star Wars Galaxy Magazine'' 13''' is the thirteenth and final issue of ''[[Star Wars Galaxy Magazine]]'' before it was converted into ''[[Star Wars Galaxy Collector]]''. Issue 13 was published by [[Topps]] in [[October]] [[1997]]. The issue's theme focused on [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knights]], particularly those of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Old Republic]].

The Deluxe Collectors' Edition of issue 13, exclusive to subscribers and comic stores, came polybagged with a Topps ''[[1997 Topps Star Wars Vehicles]]'' promotional trading card and a ''Star Wars'' UK Foil Pack containing five trading cards. This issue also included a [[The Jedi Poster|Jedi]] fold-out poster article.
